title: Graph-Based Code Generation
scenario: Write a Python class that represents a graph data structure. The class should have methods for adding nodes and edges, traversing the graph, and checking if a path exists between two nodes. The class should be able to handle edge cases such as an empty graph or a graph with cycles. Limit the output to 200 lines.

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the code is syntactically correct.
Verify that the class works correctly for different inputs.
Evaluate the readability and maintainability of the code.
